sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: PLDT, Smart advance inclusive cyber safety education for blind learners
feed.summary: PLDT Inc. and Smart Communications, Inc., in partnership with ATRIEV, conducted a three-day cyber safety workshop for 25 visually impaired women and girls at the Philippine National School for the Blind. This initiative, part of their IDEATe program, aimed to equip participants with knowledge about online risks like phishing and scams, and practical cyber hygiene strategies. The program emphasizes inclusive digital education to ensure underserved sectors can safely navigate the online world.

feed.title: Bullish on Pembina Pipeline Corp.
feed.summary: Pembina Pipeline Corp. (PPL-T) shows a bullish outlook, having broken out of a consolidation phase. The stock's previous advance from $38.79 to $60.72, supported by a rising trendline and its 40-week moving average (40WMA), suggests a new uptrend. While currently experiencing a modest pullback, this may offer a favorable entry point, with the bullish view weakening only if it falls below the 40WMA near $54-$55.

feed.title: Equifax Inc. (EFX) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript Summary
feed.summary: This document is a summary of the Q1 2026 earnings call transcript for Equifax Inc. (EFX). It details the key financial performance and operational highlights discussed during the call for the period.

feed.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) Expected to Announce Quarterly Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) is expected to announce its Q1 2026 earnings before market open on Wednesday, April 29th, with analysts forecasting EPS of $9.10 and revenue of $3.4479 billion. Recent positive developments include successful Phase 3 trials for cemdisiran and expansion of Dupixent's label, alongside a dividend increase. The company's stock trades with a market cap of $79.01 billion and has an average analyst price target of $811.96, indicating a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Rail supplier Wabtec builds $30.8B backlog as sales jump 13%
feed.summary: Wabtec Corporation reported a strong start to 2026 with first-quarter sales hitting $2.95 billion, a 13% increase, and adjusted EPS up 19% to $2.71. The company's multi-year backlog swelled to $30.8 billion, and it raised its full-year adjusted EPS guidance to $10.25 - $10.65. This growth was driven by acquisitions and strong performance across both Freight and Transit segments, positioning Wabtec for continued profitable growth.

feed.title: TE Connectivity Posts Strong Q2 Results, Raises Outlook
feed.summary: TE Connectivity reported strong Q2 2026 results with 15% sales growth and record adjusted EPS, exceeding guidance due to demand in AI data centers, next-generation transportation, and electric grid modernization. The company raised its quarterly dividend by 10% and expects continued double-digit growth in Q3. An AI analyst rates TEL stock as "Outperform" due to its financial quality and earnings outlook, despite tempered technical momentum and valuation.

feed.title: MGM exits Ohio Racino as VICI enters a lease with the new operator (MGM:NYSE)
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has completed the sale of MGM Northfield Park operations to Clairvest Group for $546 million. This divestiture is considered non-strategic by MGM's CFO. Subsequently, VICI Properties will enter into a new triple-net lease agreement with the acquiring private equity funds for the real estate.

feed.title: Delta, LATAM launch A320 component repair alliance
feed.summary: Delta TechOps and LATAM Airlines Brasil have formed an A320 component repair collaboration to support Delta's fleet and meet third-party demand. This partnership strengthens Delta's global maintenance network and leverages LATAM's MRO facility in Brazil for increased repair capacity and streamlined services. The agreement is built on a strong existing technical relationship and aims to maintain high-quality MRO capabilities for the growing A320 family aircraft market.

feed.title: $5.2B quarter as Boston Scientific adds FDA clearance, China nod
feed.summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE: BSX) reported strong Q1 2026 results with net sales reaching $5.203 billion, an 11.6% increase, and adjusted EPS of $0.80. The company highlighted broad segment and regional growth, positive clinical trial outcomes, and key regulatory approvals in China and the U.S. for its medical devices. Despite the positive financial performance, the stock experienced a 5.90% decline, wiping out approximately $5.55 billion from its valuation, indicating a negative market reaction potentially due to broader sector pressure or growth normalization.

feed.title: Earnings millions at JPMorgan versus earning millions at Morgan Stanley. An observation
feed.summary: This article analyzes the compensation structures for managing directors at JPMorgan and Morgan Stanley in London, noting an important discrepancy despite similar average earnings and bonuses. While both firms pay their material risk takers around £1.5 million on average, Morgan Stanley tends to concentrate its higher (€3M+) earners more densely than JPMorgan, which spreads its million-euro packages more widely among lower-earning millionaires. This suggests that Morgan Stanley might be preferable for aspiring very high earners, while JPMorgan offers more opportunities for those aiming for a general millionaire status.

feed.title: Bank of America, one of Cincinnati’s largest banks, expanding by opening a suburban branch
feed.summary: Bank of America is expanding its presence in the Cincinnati metropolitan area by opening a new branch in Colerain Township. This new location will add to the 18 existing branches Bank of America already operates in Greater Cincinnati, continuing its expansion efforts since entering the market seven years ago. The move highlights the bank's strategy of growing its physical footprint in the region.

feed.title: SageGuard Financial Group LLC Buys New Holdings in Amcor PLC $AMCR
feed.summary: SageGuard Financial Group LLC has acquired a new stake of 43,903 shares, valued at approximately $366,000, in Amcor PLC during the fourth quarter. This move is part of a broader trend of institutional investors increasing their positions in Amcor, which now holds about 45.14% institutional ownership. The company recently beat quarterly EPS estimates and announced a quarterly dividend, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $50.89.

feed.title: Humana (HUM) Projected to Post Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Humana (NYSE:HUM) is projected to release its Q1 2026 earnings before market open on Wednesday, April 29th, with analysts forecasting EPS of $10.00 and revenue of $39.08 billion. The company reported better-than-expected earnings in the previous quarter and increased revenue by 11.3% year-over-year. Humana also recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.885 per share, and an insider increased their stake in the company.

feed.title: Penobscot Investment Management Company Inc. Sells 13,764 Shares of Church & Dwight Co., Inc. $CHD

The stock currently has an average "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $101.59.

feed.title: Meritage Portfolio Management Acquires New Holdings in DTE Energy Company $DTE
feed.summary: Meritage Portfolio Management has initiated a new position in DTE Energy Company (NYSE:DTE), purchasing 21,640 shares valued at approximately $2.79 million in Q4. This move is part of a broader trend of institutional investors increasing their stakes, with overall institutional ownership now at 76.06%. feed.title: Meritage Portfolio Management Has $494,000 Stock Position in AT&T Inc. $T
feed.summary: Meritage Portfolio Management significantly reduced its stake in AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) by 91% in the fourth quarter, selling over 200,000 shares but still retaining a position valued at $494,000. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors largely increased their holdings, with institutional investors and hedge funds now owning 57.10% of AT&T's stock. The article also highlights recent positive and neutral sentiments surrounding AT&T, including a new "Overweight" rating from Morgan Stanley, enhanced customer cards, and an attractive dividend yield, alongside negative sentiments regarding macro shifts and technical patterns.

feed.title: [EFFECT] PodcastOne, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on an SEC Filing (Form EFFECT) by PodcastOne, Inc. (PODC), indicating a neutral impact and sentiment. The filing, dated April 22, 2026, concerns a Notice of Effectiveness for Form S-3, with an effective date of April 21, 2026. The article also provides an overview of recent news and SEC filings related to PodcastOne, including insider trading activities and renewed content agreements.

feed.title: Cboe sells Canadian, Australian exchanges to TMX for $300 million
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets Inc. has agreed to sell its Canadian and Australian equities exchanges to TMX Group Limited for $300 million, a move aimed at reallocating resources to core businesses and emerging areas. The transaction, which includes Cboe Canada and Cboe Australia, is part of a strategic realignment first announced in October 2025 and requires regulatory approvals for separate closings. Cboe will continue operations and provide transition support until the sales are complete, with financial implications to be discussed during its Q1 2026 earnings call.

feed.title: [EFFECT] PROSPERITY BANCSHARES INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details an SEC Filing (Form EFFECT) for Prosperity Bancshares Inc. which became effective on April 21, 2026, at 4:00 P.M. The filing is categorized with a neutral impact and sentiment. The article also provides recent news and SEC filings for Prosperity Bancshares Inc., along with market data.

feed.title: TE Connectivity Fiscal Q2 Adjusted Earnings, Sales Rise; Shares Down Pre-Bell
feed.summary: TE Connectivity (TEL) reported an increase in fiscal Q2 adjusted earnings and sales, but its shares were down in pre-bell trading. The company expects fiscal Q3 sales of approximately $5 billion and adjusted earnings per share of around $2.83, both above FactSet estimates. However, Q2 sales of $4.74 billion slightly missed the FactSet estimate of $4.75 billion.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (ELV) Elevance Health, Inc. Posts Q1 Adjusted EPS $12.58 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $11.03
feed.summary: Elevance Health, Inc. (ELV) reported Q1 adjusted EPS of $12.58 per share, significantly exceeding FactSet's estimate of $11.03. The health insurer also posted Q1 revenue of $49.49 billion, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $48.17 billion. Following these strong results, Elevance Health raised its annual profit forecast, attributing the increase to successful medical cost controls.

feed.title: Jones Kertz & Associates Inc. Buys Shares of 4,540 Invesco QQQ $QQQ
feed.summary: Jones Kertz & Associates Inc. acquired 4,540 shares of Invesco QQQ (NASDAQ:QQQ) in Q4, a new stake valued at approximately $2.79 million. This purchase makes QQQ the fund's 22nd largest position, representing 1.4% of its holdings. The article highlights strong institutional demand and significant ETF inflows for QQQ, driven partly by AI/tech spending, but also notes potential risks from small-cap rotation and geopolitical uncertainties.

feed.title: Novem Group Takes Position in EOG Resources, Inc. $EOG
feed.summary: Novem Group acquired a new position of 9,676 shares in EOG Resources (NYSE:EOG) during the fourth quarter, valued at approximately $1.02 million. This move is part of broader institutional investment, with various firms modifying their holdings in the energy exploration company. EOG Resources recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.02, while analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $153.11.

feed.title: Earnings Preview: What to Expect From Cardinal Health's Report
feed.summary: Cardinal Health (CAH) is set to announce its fiscal Q3 2026 earnings before market open on April 30. Analysts anticipate a 19.6% increase in profit to $2.81 per share, continuing a trend of exceeding Wall Street's bottom-line estimates. The healthcare services company has seen significant stock appreciation, outperforming the S&P 500 and a healthcare ETF over the past year, and analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" rating with a substantial potential upside.

feed.title: Dominion: Undervalued With A 4.2% Yield (NYSE:D)
feed.summary: Dominion Energy (D) is presented as an undervalued utility with a premium yield of 4.2%. The company operates as a regulated utility in Virginia and South Carolina, targeting 5-7% annual EPS growth with a $64.7 billion capital plan focused on grid and gas infrastructure, including the Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind project. Upcoming earnings on May 1st make it a timely stock to revisit, especially given its attractive valuation and dividend.

feed.title: William Blair sees flat CarMax stock used unit comps in May quarter
feed.summary: William Blair anticipates CarMax (NYSE:KMX) to report flat used unit comparable sales for the May quarter, surpassing consensus estimates of a decline. The firm also projects higher-than-consensus earnings per share for the first quarter and the full year, driven by expected declines in retail gross profit per unit and SG&A expenses. This positive outlook is supported by web data analysis trends.

feed.title: BTIG downgrades Synchrony Financial stock rating to neutral on valuation
feed.summary: BTIG has downgraded Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) from Buy to Neutral and removed its price target due to valuation concerns, as the stock is now trading 7% above BTIG’s previous $72 target. Despite strong first-quarter results for fiscal 2026, including higher-than-expected EPS and revenue, alongside significant share repurchases, BTIG noted pressures from revenue-sharing arrangements and unclear growth drivers for non-co-brand cards. Other firms like Evercore ISI and BofA Securities maintained positive ratings and raised price targets, citing solid purchase volume and an improved credit outlook.

feed.title: B. Riley Raises its Price Target on Onto Innovation (ONTO) to $330
feed.summary: B. Riley analyst Craig Ellis raised the price target for Onto Innovation (NYSE:ONTO) to $330 from $310, maintaining a Buy rating after the company's positive Q1 pre-announcement and the qualification of its Dragonfly G5 platform for advanced packaging. Onto Innovation also increased its Q1 revenue outlook and announced initial shipments for its new platform are expected in June. This comes as demand for AI-driven devices is projected to grow significantly, aligning with ONTO's solutions for process control and metrology in the semiconductor industry.

feed.title: Exxon eyes sale of Hong Kong gas stations for up to $600 million, Bloomberg News reports
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil is reportedly considering selling its network of gas stations in Hong Kong, a deal that could fetch several hundred million dollars and potentially up to $600 million according to Bloomberg News. The company has engaged a financial adviser and is in discussions with potential bidders. Exxon operates approximately 41 Esso-branded service stations in Hong Kong, with its first station opening in 1926.

feed.title: [8-K] TE Connectivity plc Reports Material Event
feed.summary: TE Connectivity plc reported strong fiscal Q2 2026 results, exceeding guidance with net sales of $4.74 billion, up 15% year over year, and record adjusted EPS of $2.73, an increase of 24%. The company also achieved record orders of $5.3 billion, demonstrating robust demand across its segments and expects continued double-digit sales and EPS growth in Q3 2026. This performance was attributed to strategic positioning in key trends like AI and next-generation transportation, alongside strong operational execution and increased shareholder returns.

feed.title: Barclays Upgrades Seagate Technology to Overweight From Equalweight, Adjusts PT to $625 From $425
feed.summary: Barclays has upgraded Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX) to an "Overweight" rating from "Equalweight," significantly increasing its price target to $625 from $425. This positive adjustment reflects an optimistic outlook on Seagate Technology, a leading manufacturer of data storage systems. The news, published on April 22, 2026, also noted recent adjustments to Seagate's price target by other firms like Citigroup, Susquehanna, Mizuho, and Bernstein.

feed.title: Cboe agrees to sell Cboe Australia and Cboe Canada to TMX Group for $300M
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets has reached a definitive agreement to sell its Canadian and Australian equities exchanges, Cboe Canada and Cboe Australia, to TMX Group Limited for US$300 million. This sale is part of a strategic realignment by Cboe to focus on core strengths and emerging opportunities. The transaction is subject to regulatory approvals and is expected to close separately for each exchange, with Cboe providing transition services post-closing.

feed.title: [8-K] Otis Worldwide Corp Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide Corporation reported Q1 2026 results with net sales up 6% to $3.6 billion, driven by an 11% increase in Service net sales, despite a 1% decline in New Equipment sales. While GAAP EPS rose 43% to $0.87, adjusted EPS fell 3% to $0.89 due to higher costs, interest, and taxes. The company revised its full-year 2026 outlook, projecting net sales of $15.1–$15.3 billion and adjusted EPS of $4.20–$4.24, anticipating stronger momentum in the coming quarters.

feed.title: Paychex, Inc. $PAYX Stock Holdings Decreased by PFG Advisors
feed.summary: PFG Advisors significantly reduced its stake in Paychex, Inc. by 38.6% in Q4, selling over 16,000 shares. Despite this, other major institutional investors, including Vanguard Group Inc., increased their holdings. Paychex recently exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue estimates and authorized a $1.0 billion share buyback, yet the average analyst rating remains "Reduce" with a target price of $106.38.

feed.title: PFG Advisors Has $2.63 Million Holdings in Northrop Grumman Corporation $NOC
feed.summary: PFG Advisors reduced its stake in Northrop Grumman Corporation by 33.8% in Q4, now holding 4,608 shares valued at approximately $2.63 million. Despite Northrop Grumman beating Q1 earnings estimates, its shares fell around 6.9% after management reaffirmed full-year 2026 guidance, increased near-term capital expenditure for B-21 production, and noted seasonal cash burn and a program charge. Institutional investors own about 83.4% of the company, while insiders have sold approximately $15.9 million worth of shares in the last three months.

feed.title: PFG Advisors Reduces Stock Position in AMETEK, Inc. $AME

feed.title: PFG Advisors Decreases Stake in Honeywell International Inc. $HON

feed.title: Barclays Upgrades Skyworks Solutions to Overweight From Equalweight, Adjusts PT to $70 From $60
feed.summary: Barclays has upgraded its rating for Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) from "Equalweight" to "Overweight" and increased its price target from $60 to $70. Skyworks Solutions specializes in high-performance, mixed-signal semiconductors for various industries, including consumer electronics, mobile communication systems, and automotive.

feed.title: Ecolab, Inc. Experiences Revision in Its Stock Evaluation Amid Strong Market Position
feed.summary: Ecolab, Inc. has undergone a valuation adjustment, displaying a high P/E ratio of 45 and a price-to-book value of 10.28, signifying its premium status in the specialty chemicals industry. The company exhibits strong profitability with a ROCE of 16.68% and an ROE of 22.79%, coupled with a modest dividend yield of 0.96%. Its valuation metrics position it at a higher tier compared to peers like Linde Plc, with Air Products & Chemicals, Inc. showing a more cautious valuation.

feed.title: Going Into Earnings, Is Alphabet Stock a Buy, a Sell, or Fairly Valued?
feed.summary: Morningstar assesses Alphabet (GOOGL) ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings release, considering whether the stock is a buy, sell, or fairly valued. The company expects strong performance in Google Cloud due to increased AI spending and stable search revenues. Alphabet is currently rated as fairly valued with a 3-star rating, a $340 fair value estimate, and a wide economic moat.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Industrial Goods Companies: United Airlines Holdings (UAL) and GE Vernova Inc. (GEV)
feed.summary: Analysts from Evercore ISI have offered bullish sentiments on United Airlines Holdings (UAL) and GE Vernova Inc. (GEV). Duane Pfennigwerth maintained a Buy rating on UAL, noting a Strong Buy consensus among analysts with a significant upside. Alexander Virgo also maintained a Buy rating on GEV, with a Strong Buy consensus, despite a slight downside from current levels.
